mapper.select: SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NAME, DEPT_CODE, POSITION, HIRE_DATE, SALARY, GENDER, MARRIED, SKILL, HOBBY, MEMO FROM tbl_employees
SELECT DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_EMP FROM tbl_department
SELECT DET_CODE AS CODE, DET_NAME AS NAME FROM tbl_common_code WHERE MST_CODE = 'POSITION'
` SELECT DET_CODE AS CODE, DET_NAME AS NAME FROM tbl_common_code WHERE MST_CODE = 'SKILL'
SELECT DET_CODE AS CODE, DET_NAME AS NAME FROM tbl_common_code WHERE MST_CODE = 'HOBBY'

SELECT MST_CODE , MST_NAME , DET_CODE AS CODE , DET_NAME AS NAME FROM tbl_common_code WHERE MST_CODE IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_employees (EMP_ID, EMP_NAME, DEPT_CODE, POSITION, HIRE_DATE, SALARY, GENDER, MARRIED, SKILL, HOBBY, MEMO) VALUES (#{EMP_ID}, #{EMP_NAME}, #{DEPT_CODE}, #{POSITION}, #{HIRE_DATE}, #{SALARY}, #{GENDER}, #{MARRIED}, #{SKILL}, #{HOBBY}, #{MEMO})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_employees WHERE EMP_ID = #{strEmpId}
SELECT ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_USER FROM tbl_sample

SELECT ROWNUM, ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN FROM ( SELECT ID , NAME , DESCRIPTION , USE_YN , REG_USER , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID DESC) AS ROWNUM FROM tbl_sample ) AS sub ORDER BY ROWNUM LIMIT #{cnt} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT count(*) as totalCnt FROM TBL_SAMPLE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_user (USER_NAME, EMAIL, TEL_NO, IMAGE_ID, IMAGE_NAME) VALUES (#{USER_NAME}, #{EMAIL}, #{TEL_NO}, #{IMAGE_ID}, #{IMAGE_NAME})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NAME, EMAIL, TEL_NO, IMAGE_ID, IMAGE_NAME FROM tbl_user
